# Pull Request

## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm check-types`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm release:gates`

## Contract Changes

- [ ] No public graph, compiler, query, plugin, or type contract changed.
- [ ] RFC linked if a public contract changed.

## Evidence

Attach relevant diagnostics, graph diffs, semantic evaluation output, benchmark output, or skill validation output.
